articles.title: ‘America’s Next Top Model’ Warped Her Story. Dani Evans Is Having the Last Word - Rolling Stone
articles.description: For the first time since the release of Netflix's 'Reality Check, America’s Next Top Model,' Dani Evans is sharing her story.
articles.content: Dani Evans has learned to trust her gut instinct. It’s a habit she’s developed since the events that took place 20 years ago on America’s Next Top Model and after she walked away with the grand prize… [+12722 chars]
